untranslatable_reason: Signal requires index-relative comparison (r_i - <r>) and position sizing proportional to relative deviation magnitude. The backtest engine cannot compute cross-sectional relative returns or rank-based position sizing against index mean. Threshold for 'significantly positive/negative' marked AUTHOR_SILENT with no quantified cutoff. This requires custom cross-sectional momentum logic unavailable in single-instrument indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture directional intent using returns indicator, but the core logic—comparing each stock's return to the index average and weighting by deviation magnitude—requires basket-level calculations not supported by single-stock indicators. Daily rebalancing with $1 normalized capital noted but cannot be encoded in rule conditions. Recommend implementing as custom cross-sectional mean-reversion factor.
